description: A macroecology team is mapping global plant hardiness zones and needs a continentality index map (Annual Temperature Range). Your briefing is at ~/Desktop/continentality_brief.txt. Using the NCEP surface air temperature climatology dataset (~/PanoplyData/air.mon.ltm.nc), generate a map showing the difference between July and January temperatures (July minus January). Export this map to ~/Documents/Continentality/annual_temp_range.png. Identify the land region with the highest positive temperature difference and record your findings in a report at ~/Documents/Continentality/biome_report.txt.
